## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's [coding standards](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I've tested my changes locally (`swift test` or `xcodebuild test`)
- [ ] I've updated documentation if behavior changed
- [ ] I haven't introduced new external dependencies
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal information in the diff
- [ ] My changes are scoped to one concern — no unrelated refactors
